calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-15-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arta Lahiji - Plaintiff, Cross-defendant; Assen Roguev - Defendant, Cross-Complainant

This matter comes on for Court trial, having been continued from June 1, 2022 and after peremptory challenge of Judge Tong sitting in Dept. 506.

All parties and witnesses are placed under oath.

Ms. Lahiji testifies in support of Plaintiff's Claim.

Exhibits identified:
Exhibit 1: San Francisco Rent Board Decision on Appeal
Plaintiff Exhibit A: Police Body Cam
Plaintiff Exhibit B: Roguev Request for Temporary Restraining Order against Lahiji

Mr. Roguev testifies in support of Defendant's claim.

Exhibits identified:
Defendant Exhibit A: Medical Records (collective exhibit)
Defendant Exhibit B: Roguev Request for Temporary Restraining Order against Lahiji

The Court notes the want of medical testimony to support a connection between the claimed 2018 event and the alleged 2021/22 injuries/symptoms.

The Court finds for Plaintiff Lahiji in the amount of $825, payable in 30 days.

Additionally, the Court finds there is no evidence to support delayed discovery for the filing of a claim outside the statute of limitations and finds for Ms. Lahiji with respect to Mr. Roguev's claim.

The parties' respective exhibits from CSM-10-860856 are returned to them this date.

Judge: Hon. Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

The Court finds for Plaintiff Lahiji in the amount of $825. The Court denies

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
